### Brody  (id 100, cost 1)

- **Class:** Marksman  ·  **Faction:** Neobeasts  ·  **Position:** Back-row
- **Skill (Abyss Corrosion):** Passive: When battle starts, Brody grants 10% ATK Speed to himself and allies within 1 tile to his left and right. His Basic ATK causes enemies to take (+20% Total Physical ATK) extra Physical DMG from his subsequent Basic ATKs for 4s. Max Stacks: 5.
